name: powerplatform
description: A Pulumi provider for managing Microsoft Power Platform resources.

tenantId.description: The Azure AD Tenant ID for authenticating with Power Platform. Can also be set with the AZURE_TENANT_ID environment variable.

clientId.description: The Azure AD Application (Client) ID. Can also be set with the AZURE_CLIENT_ID environment variable.

clientSecret.description: The Azure AD Client Secret. Can also be set with the AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET environment variable.

powerplatform:index:EnterprisePolicy.description: An enterprise policy associated with a Power Platform environment.

id.description: The resource ID of the policy.

powerplatform:index:RuleSet.description: A rule set for a DLP policy, defining data loss prevention rules.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rule set.

version.description: The version of the rule set.

inputs.description: The inputs for the rule set, which may vary based on the rule.

powerplatform:index:BillingInstrument.description: Azure billing instrument (subscription) details for a billing policy.

resourceGroup.description: The Azure resource group within the subscription.

powerplatform:index:ConnectorSummary.description: Summary information about a Power Platform connector.

id.description: The unique identifier of the connector.

name.description: The internal name of the connector.

displayName.description: The display name of the connector.

powerplatform:index:AppSummary.description: Summary information about a Power App.

id.description: The unique identifier of the app.

name.description: The internal name of the app.

displayName.description: The display name of the app.

powerplatform:index:FlowSummary.description: Summary information about a Cloud Flow.

id.description: The unique identifier of the flow.

name.description: The internal name of the flow.

displayName.description: The display name of the flow.

powerplatform:index:EnvironmentSummary.description: Summary information about a Power Platform environment.

id.description: The unique identifier of the environment.

displayName.description: The display name of the environment.

domainName.description: The domain name of the Dataverse database.

state.description: The current state of the environment.

url.description: The URL of the Dataverse database.

geo.description: The geographical region of the environment.

azureRegion.description: The Azure region of the environment.

securityGroupId.description: The security group that controls access.

tenantId.description: The tenant that the environment belongs to.

environmentGroupId.description: The environment group to which this environment belongs.

version.description: The version of the Dataverse database.

powerplatform:index:Dataverse.description: Configuration for the Dataverse database associated with a Power Platform environment.

currencyCode.description: Currency code for the Dataverse database (e.g. USD). Immutable after creation.

languageCode.description: Base language LCID (e.g. 1033). Immutable after creation.

domainName.description: Domain prefix for the Dataverse instance URL.

securityGroupId.description: AAD security group GUID restricting environment access.

administrationModeEnabled.description: Whether the Dataverse instance is in administration mode.

backgroundOperationEnabled.description: Whether background operations are enabled during administration mode.

templates.description: Provisioning templates (e.g. D365_Sales). Immutable after creation.

templateMetadata.description: JSON metadata for provisioning templates. Immutable after creation.

url.description: URL of the Dataverse instance. Computed.

powerplatform:index:TenantPowerPlatformS.description: Power Platform workload settings at tenant scope.

disablePreferredDataLocationForTeamsEnvi.description: Disable preferred data location for Teams environment creation.

disableDeveloperEnvironmentCreationByNon.description: Disable developer environment creation by non-admin users.

environmentRoutingAllMakers.description: Route all makers to personal dev environments.

environmentRoutingTargetEnvironmentGroup.description: Target environment group for default environment routing.

environmentRoutingTargetSecurityGroupId.description: Target security group for default environment routing.

enableDesktopFlowDataPolicyManagement.description: Enable desktop flow data policy management.

disableBillingPolicyCreationByNonAdminUs.description: Disable billing policy creation by non-admin users.

enableTenantCapacityReportForEnvironment.description: Enable tenant capacity report for environment admins.

enableTenantLicensingReportForEnvironmen.description: Enable tenant licensing report for environment admins.

disableUseOfUnassignedAIBuilderCredits.description: Disable use of unassigned AI Builder credits.

enableDeleteDisabledUserInAllEnvironment.description: Enable delete disabled user in all environments.

powerplatform:index:DataRecordLookup.description: A reference to a related Dataverse record used as a lookup (single-valued) or many-to-many relationship value.

tableLogicalName.description: The logical name of the related Dataverse table (e.g. systemuser, account, deploymentstage).

dataRecordId.description: The GUID of the related record.

powerplatform:index:DataRecordsExpandPar.description: OData $expand parameter for a navigation property in getDataRecords.

navigationProperty.description: The navigation property name to expand.

select.description: Comma-separated list of columns to include for the expanded entity.

filter.description: OData filter expression for the expanded entity.

powerplatform:index:EnvironmentGroup.description: Manages a Power Platform environment group. Environment groups allow you to organize environments and apply policies at a group level.

displayName.description: The display name for the environment group.

description.description: A description of the environment group.

parentGroupId.description: The ID of the parent environment group, if this is a nested group.

displayName.description: The display name of the environment group.

description.description: The description of the environment group.

parentGroupId.description: The ID of the parent environment group.

createdTime.description: The timestamp when the group was created.

lastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the group was last modified.

powerplatform:index:DlpPolicy.description: Manages a Power Platform Data Loss Prevention (DLP) policy. DLP policies define rules to control how connectors can share data. Note: Deletion removes all rule sets from the policy, as the SDK does not expose a direct policy delete endpoint.

name.description: The name of the DLP policy.

ruleSets.description: The rule sets that define the DLP policy rules.

name.description: The name of the DLP policy.

ruleSets.description: The rule sets that define the DLP policy rules.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID that owns the policy.

lastModified.description: The timestamp when the policy was last modified.

ruleSetCount.description: The number of rule sets in the policy.

powerplatform:index:BillingPolicy.description: Manages a Power Platform billing policy. Billing policies control pay-as-you-go billing for Power Platform environments.

name.description: The name of the billing policy.

location.description: The geographic location for the billing policy (e.g., unitedstates, europe).

status.description: The status of the billing policy: Enabled or Disabled.

name.description: The name of the billing policy.

location.description: The geographic location of the billing policy.

status.description: The status of the billing policy.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the billing policy was created.

lastModifiedOn.description: The timestamp when the billing policy was last modified.

powerplatform:index:ManagedEnvironment.description: Enables managed environment governance on a Power Platform environment. Managed environments provide enhanced admin controls. Deleting this resource disables the managed environment setting.

environmentId.description: The ID of the Power Platform environment to manage.
The ID of the managed environment.

enabled.description: Whether the managed environment is enabled.

powerplatform:index:EnvironmentBackup.description: Creates a manual backup of a Power Platform environment. Backups are immutable — any change to inputs triggers replacement.

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment to back up.

label.description: A descriptive label for the backup.

environmentId.description: The ID of the backed-up environment.

backupPointDateTime.description: The date and time when the backup was created.

backupExpiryDateTime.description: The date and time when the backup expires.

powerplatform:index:RoleAssignment.description: Assigns a role to a principal (user, group, or service principal) at a specified scope. Role assignments are immutable — any change to inputs triggers replacement.

principalObjectId.description: The object ID of the principal (user, group, or service principal) to assign the role to.

principalType.description: The type of the principal: User, Group, or ServicePrincipal.

roleDefinitionId.description: The ID of the role definition to assign.

scope.description: The scope of the role assignment (e.g., tenant, environment, or environment group).

principalObjectId.description: The object ID of the assigned principal.

principalType.description: The type of the assigned principal.

scope.description: The scope of the role assignment.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the role assignment was created.

powerplatform:index:IsvContract.description: Manages an ISV (Independent Software Vendor) contract for Power Platform licensing.

name.description: The name of the ISV contract.

geo.description: The geographic region for the ISV contract (e.g., unitedstates, europe). Immutable after creation.

status.description: The status of the ISV contract: Enabled or Disabled.

name.description: The name of the ISV contract.

geo.description: The geographic region of the ISV contract.

status.description: The status of the ISV contract.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the ISV contract was created.

lastModifiedOn.description: The timestamp when the ISV contract was last modified.

powerplatform:index:Environment.description: Manages a Power Platform environment. Environments are containers for apps, flows, data, and other resources. Uses the BAP admin REST API for lifecycle management.

displayName.description: The display name of the environment.

location.description: The geographic region for the environment (e.g., unitedstates, europe). Immutable after creation.

environmentType.description: The type (SKU) of the environment: Sandbox, Production, Trial, Developer, or Default. Immutable after creation.

azureRegion.description: Specific Azure region within the location geo (e.g. westus2). Immutable after creation.

ownerId.description: AAD user or group GUID who owns the environment. Only valid for Developer environments.

cadence.description: Release wave cadence: Frequent or Moderate. Immutable after creation.

billingPolicyId.description: ID of the billing policy to link to this environment.

environmentGroupId.description: ID of the environment group this environment belongs to.

allowBingSearch.description: Allow Bing Search integration (AI generative features).

allowMovingDataAcrossRegions.description: Allow data to move across geographic boundaries for Copilot features.

linkedAppType.description: Type of linked app: Canvas or ModelDriven.

enterprisePolicies.description: Set of enterprise policies associated with the environment.

dataverse.description: Dataverse database configuration. Presence triggers Dataverse provisioning.

displayName.description: The display name of the environment.

location.description: The geographic region of the environment.

azureRegion.description: Specific Azure region within the location geo.

ownerId.description: AAD user or group GUID who owns the environment.

cadence.description: Release wave cadence: Frequent or Moderate.

billingPolicyId.description: ID of the billing policy linked to this environment.

allowBingSearch.description: Whether Bing Search integration is allowed.

allowMovingDataAcrossRegions.description: Whether data can move across geographic boundaries for Copilot features.

linkedAppType.description: Type of linked app: Canvas or ModelDriven.

enterprisePolicies.description: Enterprise policies associated with the environment.

linkedAppUrl.description: URL of the linked app. Computed.

state.description: The current state of the environment (e.g., Ready, Preparing).

createdTime.description: The timestamp when the environment was created.

lastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the environment was last modified.

dataverse.description: Dataverse database configuration. Presence triggers Dataverse provisioning.

powerplatform:index:EnvironmentSettings.description: Manages settings on a Power Platform environment. Settings are applied via PATCH to the BAP admin API. Deletion removes the resource from Pulumi state only (settings cannot be unset).

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment to manage settings for. Immutable after creation.

maxUploadFileSize.description: Maximum file upload size in bytes.

pluginTraceLogSetting.description: Plugin trace log setting (Off, Exception, All).

isAuditEnabled.description: Whether auditing is enabled (true or false).

isUserAccessAuditEnabled.description: Whether user access auditing is enabled (true or false).

isActivityLoggingEnabled.description: Whether activity logging is enabled (true or false).

isReadAuditEnabled.description: Whether read auditing is enabled (GDPR). Managed via Dataverse organizations table.

auditRetentionPeriodInDays.description: Audit log retention period in days. Use -1 for forever, or a value between 31 and 24855.

allowApplicationUserAccess.description: Whether service principal (application user) access is allowed.

allowMicrosoftTrustedServiceTags.description: Whether Microsoft trusted Azure service tags are allowed for connectivity.

reverseProxyIpAddresses.description: Comma-separated list of allowed reverse proxy IP addresses or CIDR ranges.

powerAppsComponentFrameworkForCanvasApps.description: Whether Power Apps Component Framework (PCF) controls are enabled for canvas apps.

showDashboardCardsInExpandedState.description: Whether dashboard cards are shown in expanded state by default.

maxUploadFileSize.description: Maximum file upload size in bytes.

isUserAccessAuditEnabled.description: Whether user access auditing is enabled.

auditRetentionPeriodInDays.description: Audit log retention period in days.

allowApplicationUserAccess.description: Whether service principal (application user) access is allowed.

allowMicrosoftTrustedServiceTags.description: Whether Microsoft trusted Azure service tags are allowed.

reverseProxyIpAddresses.description: Allowed reverse proxy IP addresses or CIDR ranges.

powerAppsComponentFrameworkForCanvasApps.description: Whether PCF controls are enabled for canvas apps.

showDashboardCardsInExpandedState.description: Whether dashboard cards are shown in expanded state by default.

powerplatform:index:TenantSettings.description: Manages tenant-level Power Platform settings used for governance and platform-wide controls.

disableEnvironmentCreationByNonAdminUser.description: Disable environment creation by non-admin users.

disablePortalsCreationByNonAdminUsers.description: Disable Power Pages creation by non-admin users.

disableTrialEnvironmentCreationByNonAdmi.description: Disable trial environment creation by non-admin users.

disableCapacityAllocationByEnvironmentAd.description: Disable capacity allocation by environment admins.

disableSupportTicketsVisibleByAllUsers.description: Disable support tickets visibility by all users.

disableEnvironmentCreationByNonAdminUser.description: Disable environment creation by non-admin users.

disablePortalsCreationByNonAdminUsers.description: Disable Power Pages creation by non-admin users.

disableTrialEnvironmentCreationByNonAdmi.description: Disable trial environment creation by non-admin users.

disableCapacityAllocationByEnvironmentAd.description: Disable capacity allocation by environment admins.

disableSupportTicketsVisibleByAllUsers.description: Disable support tickets visibility by all users.

powerplatform:index:AdminManagementAppli.description: Registers a service principal as a Power Platform admin management application. This is a prerequisite for managing environment application administrators. The resource is fully immutable — any change to applicationId triggers a replacement.

applicationId.description: The GUID of the service principal to register as a Power Platform admin management application. Immutable after creation.
The GUID of the registered service principal.

powerplatform:index:EnvironmentApplicati.description: Adds a service principal as System Administrator in a Dataverse-enabled Power Platform environment. Creates a systemuser record via the Dataverse Web API. Both environmentId and applicationId are immutable — any change triggers resource replacement.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment. Must have a Dataverse instance. Immutable after creation.

applicationId.description: The GUID of the service principal (application) to add as System Administrator. Immutable after creation.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment.

applicationId.description: The GUID of the registered service principal.

systemUserId.description: The Dataverse systemuser record GUID for the registered application user.

powerplatform:index:DataRecord.description: Manages a generic Dataverse table record via the OData Web API. Supports scalar columns, single-valued lookups (via @odata.bind), and many-to-many relationships (via $ref). Both environmentId and tableLogicalName are immutable — any change triggers resource replacement. Column values may be scalars (string/number/bool), lookup objects (DataRecordLookup), or lists of lookup objects for M2M relationships.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment containing the Dataverse instance. Immutable after creation.

tableLogicalName.description: The logical name of the Dataverse table (e.g. deploymentpipeline, account). Immutable after creation.

columns.description: Map of column logical name to value. Scalars (string/number/bool), null, DataRecordLookup objects, or lists of DataRecordLookup objects for M2M relationships.

disableOnDestroy.description: When true, deactivate the record (statecode=1) before deleting it. Required for Dataverse tables that cannot be directly deleted while active (e.g. workflow definitions). Defaults to false.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment.

tableLogicalName.description: The logical name of the Dataverse table.

columns.description: The column values stored on the record.

disableOnDestroy.description: Whether to deactivate the record before deletion.

dataRecordId.description: The GUID of the Dataverse record. Use this to reference the record in lookup or M2M column values of other DataRecord resources.

powerplatform:index:EnterprisePolicyLink.description: Links an Azure enterprise policy to a Power Platform environment using an async POST/poll lifecycle. All properties are immutable — any change triggers a full replacement (delete-then-create). Supported policy types: NetworkInjection, Encryption, Identity.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment to link the enterprise policy to. Immutable after creation.

policyType.description: The type of enterprise policy to link. Must be one of: NetworkInjection, Encryption, Identity. Immutable after creation.

systemId.description: The ARM resource ID of the enterprise policy. Expected format: /regions/{location}/providers/Microsoft.PowerPlatform/enterprisePolicies/{guid}. Immutable after creation.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment.

policyType.description: The type of enterprise policy. One of: NetworkInjection, Encryption, Identity.

systemId.description: The ARM resource ID of the linked enterprise policy.

powerplatform:index:getEnvironments.description: Retrieves a list of Power Platform environments available for the authenticated user.

filter.description: An OData filter expression. Supported properties: dataverseId, type, geo, state, environmentGroupId, domainName.

top.description: Maximum number of environments to return.

powerplatform:index:getConnectors.description: Lists connectors available in a Power Platform environment.

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment to list connectors for.

powerplatform:index:getApps.description: Lists Power Apps in a Power Platform environment.

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment to list apps for.

powerplatform:index:getFlows.description: Lists Cloud Flows in a Power Platform environment.

environmentId.description: The ID of the environment to list flows for.

powerplatform:index:getDataRecords.description: Queries Dataverse records from a collection using OData filter, select, orderby, top, apply, and expand parameters. Returns the first page of matching records. Use the 'top' parameter to control result count for large tables.

environmentId.description: The GUID of the Power Platform environment containing the Dataverse instance.

entityCollection.description: The plural OData collection name for the Dataverse table to query (e.g. accounts, deploymentpipelines).

apply.description: OData $apply aggregation expression (e.g. "aggregate(revenue with sum as revenue_sum)").

select.description: List of column logical names to include in the response.

top.description: Maximum number of records to return ($top). Use to limit large result sets.

expand.description: List of navigation properties to expand in the response.

records.description: The list of matching Dataverse records. Each record is a map of column name to value.

totalRowsCount.description: Total number of records matching the query filter (from @odata.count). Always 0 when the count annotation is absent.

totalRowsCountLimitExceeded.description: True when the total row count exceeded the Dataverse limit (@Microsoft.Dynamics.CRM.totalrecordcountlimitexceeded).
